message:
chore(release): workspace.package inheritance + per-crate descriptions (br-h8a8 + br-lz1e)

Adds the release-day discoverability + publish-readiness metadata
across all 12 crates via [workspace.package] inheritance. Closes
both h8a8 (crates.io metadata gap) and lz1e (license-file relative
path) in one commit since workspace inheritance is the natural fix
for both.

Root Cargo.toml [workspace.package] gains:
  authors       = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeff141421@gmail.com>"]
  repository    = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas"
  homepage      = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas"
  documentation = "https://docs.rs/frankenpandas"
  readme        = "README.md"
  keywords      = ["dataframe", "pandas", "analytics", "columnar", "rust"]
  categories    = ["data-structures", "science"]

Each of the 12 per-crate Cargo.toml [package] sections now:
  name            = "<crate-name>"                           (unchanged)
  description     = "<bespoke per-crate description>"        (NEW)
  version.workspace       = true   (was hard-coded "0.1.0")
  edition.workspace       = true   (was hard-coded "2024")
  license-file.workspace  = true   (was "../../LICENSE" relative path; closes br-lz1e)
  authors.workspace       = true
  repository.workspace    = true
  homepage.workspace      = true
  readme.workspace        = true
  keywords.workspace      = true
  categories.workspace    = true

Per-crate descriptions capture what each crate uniquely does:
  fp-types         Core Scalar / DType / NullKind primitives.
  fp-columnar      Columnar storage primitives (Column, ValidityMask).
  fp-index         Flat and multi-level row index types.
  fp-runtime       Runtime policies, evidence ledgers, asupersync interop.
  fp-frame         DataFrame and Series with pandas-API parity + AACE.
  fp-io            IO layer: CSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Excel, Feather,
                   Arrow IPC, SQL (SQLite today; PostgreSQL/MySQL planned).
  fp-groupby       GroupBy engine with dense / arena / hash-map paths.
  fp-join          Merge and join engine (AG-05 leapfrog triejoin).
  fp-expr          Expression eval / query parser (df.eval / df.query parity).
  fp-conformance   Differential conformance harness + fuzz seeds + live-oracle gates.
  fp-frankentui    FrankenTUI terminal interface.
  frankenpandas    Clean-room Rust reimplementation of the pandas API.

Closes br-h8a8 (MEDIUM): 11 of 12 Cargo.toml had no description/
keywords/categories/repository — release-day discoverability gap.
Post this commit, every crate on crates.io has a full metadata
block + unique per-crate description + shared keywords/categories
for crates.io browse / search.

Closes br-lz1e (LOW): 12 crates pointed license-file at
../../LICENSE — a relative path that (a) could false-positive
cargo-deny / cargo-about audit tooling, (b) doesn't resolve on
crates.io's web UI. Workspace inheritance resolves the path
relative to the workspace root automatically; published tarballs
include the correct LICENSE file via cargo's inherit-path
semantics.

Verified under rch (CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenpandas_cc):
  cargo check --workspace --all-targets → 0 errors, 0 warnings
  Finished dev profile in 0.27s.

Prerequisites for first cargo publish (br-4clx) met by this
commit for the discoverability + licensing axes; the release
workflow itself + topological publish order + version bump policy
remain open slices of br-4clx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,13 @@ members = [
 edition = "2024"
 version = "0.1.0"
 license-file = "LICENSE"
+authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeff141421@gmail.com>"]
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankenpandas"
+documentation = "https://docs.rs/frankenpandas"
+readme = "README.md"
+keywords = ["dataframe", "pandas", "analytics", "columnar", "rust"]
+categories = ["data-structures", "science"]
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
 arrow = { version = "58.1.0", default-features = false, features = ["prettyprint", "ipc"] }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-columnar"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Columnar storage primitives (Column, ValidityMask) for pandas-parity dataframes — the storage layer behind fp-frame."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fp-types = { path = "../fp-types" }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-conformance"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Differential conformance harness for frankenpandas against a live pandas oracle — packet fixtures + fuzz seed tests + live-oracle parity gates."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [features]
 default = []

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-expr"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Expression evaluation / query parser for fp-frame DataFrames — pandas df.eval / df.query parity."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fp-columnar = { path = "../fp-columnar" }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-frame"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "DataFrame and Series with pandas-API parity, AACE index alignment, and GroupBy / Rolling / Resample integration."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 chrono = { workspace = true }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-frankentui"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "FrankenTUI terminal interface for interactive fp-frame / frankenpandas workflows."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fp-conformance = { path = "../fp-conformance" }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-groupby"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "GroupBy engine for fp-frame with dense-key / arena-backed / hash-map execution paths."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 bumpalo = { workspace = true }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-index"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Flat and multi-level row index types (Index, MultiIndex) for pandas-parity dataframes."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fp-types = { path = "../fp-types" }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-io"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "IO layer for frankenpandas: CSV, JSON, JSONL, Parquet, Excel, Feather, Arrow IPC, SQL (SQLite today; PostgreSQL/MySQL planned)."
+version.workspace = true

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@

 name = "fp-join"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Merge and join engine (AG-05 leapfrog triejoin) for fp-frame DataFrames — inner / left / right / outer joins with index alignment."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 bumpalo = { workspace = true }

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "fp-runtime"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Runtime policies, evidence ledgers, and asupersync interop for the frankenpandas execution layer."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [features]
 default = []

@@ -1,8 +1,15 @@

 name = "fp-types"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
+description = "Core Scalar, DType, NullKind primitives for the frankenpandas workspace — the universal type system behind fp-frame."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 serde = { workspace = true }

@@ -1,9 +1,15 @@
 [package]
 name = "frankenpandas"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2024"
-license-file = "../../LICENSE"
-description = "Clean-room Rust reimplementation of the pandas API"
+description = "Clean-room Rust reimplementation of the pandas API — DataFrame, Series, GroupBy, Rolling, Resample, MultiIndex, 7 IO formats. Zero unsafe."
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+homepage.workspace = true
+readme.workspace = true
+keywords.workspace = true
+categories.workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 fp-columnar = { path = "../fp-columnar" }
